outcomes.name: reconstructed_literal_wedge_no_projectile_stability
outcomes.support: The current-source literal 25-wedge DART reconstruction keeps all 25 stones within 5.431169776791696e-6 m of their constructed poses for 600 exact steps, with minimum orientation alignment 0.9999999999111284. This proves only pre-impact stability for the reconstructed scene.

outcomes.name: claim_boundary_excludes_paper_crown_impact_and_external_solver_comparison
outcomes.support: This partial evidence item is explicitly out of scope for the bundle: it contains no projectile and makes no claim about paper crown-impact behavior or Kamino/MuJoCo parity.
